label: Tc
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) explicitly state: 'Skin T cells consist of the three subtypes: cytotoxic (Tc) expressing CD8A/B, helper (Th) expressing CD4, CD40LG and regulatory (Treg) expressing FOXP3, TIGIT, CTLA4'. Disease-associated subsets include Tc IL13/IL22 (atopic dermatitis) and Tc17/Th17 (psoriasis).
